action_items: (Optional polish, NOT a regression) Consider exposing more discoverable input labels for assumption fields — the previous testing pass tried the first numeric input (Risk-Free Rate) and saw no stat-bar change because 'Manual WACC Override' was non-empty, so the auto-WACC recalculation was bypassed. A small hint like 'Clear override to re-enable auto-WACC' could improve UX.
critical_code_review_comments: Modeling.jsx is now ~1600 lines and houses 9 tab components + Explainer + Monte Carlo helpers + main page. Consider splitting tabs into /pages/modeling/tabs/*.jsx for maintainability (not blocking).
Explainer component is well-isolated, has data-testid='tab-explainer' on EVERY usage (good for testing), defaults open, and the header is a proper <button> (a11y-correct).

runMonteCarlo() does 6,000 client-side iterations via useMemo and only mounts when the MC tab is active — good perf design. Histogram tail-clips at p99 for readability, which matches the explainer's stated 'realistic ranges'.
Monte Carlo explainer correctly interpolates company name AND the dynamic % chance undervalued — text adapts per ticker (verified NVDA: '2%' vs AAPL).
Tornado correctly sorts by swing magnitude (Revenue Growth was the biggest mover for NVDA — matches a high-growth name).
Assumption inputs (36 total) all wire back through setAssKey/setAssArr → assumptions state → computeDCF useMemo → stat bar. Verified live recompute via 'Manual WACC Override' edit.
test_credentials: obaidtradez / Odm200429 (worked). Note: backend endpoint expects {username, code} not {username, password} — the frontend AuthContext handles this correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modeling page tabs are: summary, assumptions, dcf, sensitivity, montecarlo, historicals, comps, sources, memo (data-testid='dcf-tab-{id}'). Each tab top contains <Explainer data-testid='tab-explainer'> which is collapsible (default-open). Monte Carlo runs 6000 client-side simulations on mount — give it ~2-4s before scraping. Login page is /pages/auth/Login.jsx (testids: login-username-input/login-password-input/login-submit-button), NOT AccessGate.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature verification, all checks pass.
